name: XRoad · Pine — Emerald + Cobalt
summary: Dark forest-green surfaces, emerald primary accent, cobalt-blue secondary accent. WCAG 2.1 AA throughout. NOTE: implementation swapped paper / paperSoft / paperWarm / paperEdge to near-black (#0A0A0A → #2E2E2E) post-Phase-1 per user feedback — see commit e9a2659 and docs/pine/README.md.

paper.description: Primary surface — top header card, bottom sheet, FAB. IMPL: swapped to #0A0A0A.

paperSoft.description: Inverse text color used on primary-accent backgrounds. IMPL: swapped to #141414.

paperWarm.description: Secondary surface — search field background, avatar circle, active tab pill. IMPL: swapped to #1E1E1E.

paperEdge.description: Border / divider on opaque surfaces. IMPL: swapped to #2E2E2E.

inkFaint.description: Tertiary / decorative text — never for content per WCAG

primary.description: EMERALD — selected chip bg, Drive button, route stop X marker, intermediate route circles, rating chip text, progress bar fill

primaryDeep.description: Deeper emerald — primary button pressed state / cluster gradient outer stop

primaryTint.description: 10% emerald — rating chip bg, soft primary fills

secondary.description: COBALT — icon accent dots (--ax in CSS / theme.colors.accent in RN), Add stop pill text

secondaryTint.description: 10% cobalt — Add stop pill bg, soft secondary fills

cvdSafe.description: Amber fallback — replaces secondary when color-blind-safe mode is on.

danger.description: Rose — destructive actions (End trip). AA on Pine paper (~4.8:1), AA white-on-danger (~4.6:1).

dangerTint.description: 16% danger — soft shadow / glow under destructive CTA

display.use: Route hero (1h 12m), rationale headers. IMPL: split into display (32) + displaySmall (26).

title.use: Wordmark Road. IMPL: split into title (22) + titleSmall (20).

sheet.description: Bottom sheet corners (all four when floating, top-only when flush)

pill.description: Chips, mode toggle, search field, rating chip, Add stop

button.description: Tab pills, Add stop, primary CTAs

edgeGutter.description: Outer margin from phone edge for floating surfaces

sheetBottomOffset.description: Sheet lifts off the bottom edge to clear gesture pill / nav bar

headerTop.description: Top of header card below status bar

clusterRing.description: Dashed ring slowly marches around each cluster. IMPL: dropped in favor of opacity-pulsing emerald glow on the pin shape (pill head + triangle pointer).

motion.respects: prefers-reduced-motion — disable all of the above when user requests. IMPL: AccessibilityInfo.isReduceMotionEnabled() in src/design/motion.ts gates all hooks.
